# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against commit 2655e46f850a0852fe5ae858de06d92a9a133918, including full-scope files in src/tests/docs and excluding live .ralph-burning runtime state. The requested final-review planner cleanup appears complete: no `BackendPolicyRole::Planner` references remain in src/tests, final-review flow documentation and contracts were updated to the direct voter model, stale `planner_positions` placeholder references were removed, conformance scenarios no longer encode legacy planner-position steps, and fixture/test naming was updated for final-review context. No blocking correctness/safety/robustness issues found in the reviewed changes.

## Amendments

None.
